core_misconception.description: The player assumes that any tap is progress and keeps adding without checking whether the running total still fits the target.

forbidden_scope: running total must remain visible at all times
order target must remain visible at all times
no timer pressure in this first real run
overshoot must be visible and easy to understand

subject: math
success_metric: The player stops adding when the tray total equals the order target exactly and commits before overshooting.

target_skill.description: Compose a target total within 10 by selecting addends deliberately instead of guessing or tapping randomly.
